Internal Legal Memorandum — North Harbour Berhad (Company No.: 201901012345 (1324567-X)) — Proposed Private Placement and Revolving Credit Facility
This note concerns a non-public term sheet with Ringwood Capital Partners Sdn. Bhd. (Company No.: 202201234567 (1509876-T)) and is MNPI under CMSA until Bursa disclosure is made.
Pursuant to Paragraphs 9.03 and 9.19 of the Main LR and Section 188 CMSA (insider trading), no trading by insiders is permitted; note the closed period under Paragraph 14.08 from 15/06/2026 to 29/06/2026.
Key contact: Encik Rahman bin Salleh (CFO), MyKad: 840102-14-5 0 1 9, e m a i l: r.salleh @ northharbour.my, mobile +60 12-440 1123.
Treasury contact: Puan Aisha bt. Kamaruddin, aisha.kamaruddin@northharbour.my, Tel +60 3-7720 1100, correspondence address: Level 18, Menara Purnama, 12 Jalan Damai, 50450 Kuala Lumpur.
Settlement instructions (for SA escrow): First Kelantan Bank Berhad, Account No.: 142-77 8-009 912-3, SWIFT/BIC: F K L B M Y K A, beneficiary: North Harbour Berhad.
Internal link to drafts (OCR copy): http://intranet.nh-bhd.local/deals/pp2026/SPA?ref=NHB-PP&uid=EID-840102145019&co=201901012345
For foreign director onboarding, Passport No.: A1234567Z (format discrepancy noted), and IBAN: MY69 1234 5678 9012 3456 78 (not applicable in MY), are not to be used in filings.
Public hotline for HR queries: 1-300-88-0000; role-only approvers: Company Secretary, Authorised Signatory, Group Controller.
Employment matter: no material adverse change (MAC) is triggered by the proposed revision to the CEO’s service agreement; this memo is not an announcement.
Price range and investor allocation in the draft Subscription Agreement remain non-disclosed MNPI; do not circulate outside the project list.
Generic labels in the FA annexure are placeholders only (NRIC: __________; Address: __________; Authorised Signatory: __________) and do not identify any individual.
Financing terms summary (benign): Orchid ERP module licence to be capitalised; see publicly available vendor datasheet and generic policy on software capitalization.
Please observe PDPA handling of personal data above; send questions to legal @ northharbour.my or via Teams; do not upload to external drives.
ocr fragment from scanned LO: “Acc t: 142-7 78-009912-3; Rah man b. Salleh — c/o NHB Finance”; any illegible characters should be verified with Treasury before payment.
Project management note (non-PII): todo — circulate clean SA and FA to Board by 31/05; track comments in the deal room, not email.
